bugs.trigger: Type any value into 'Your name', then click the Save button (the 💾 button, id=primary-action).
bugs.expected: The 'Saved: <name>' confirmation appears in the #saved area.
bugs.actual: An uncaught TypeError is thrown (queryCache is undefined) before the confirmation renders; #saved stays empty.
bugs.crash_signature: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'invalidate')

bugs.expected: The toggle label flips AND state.notifications updates to match.
bugs.actual: The visual label flips between On/Off but state.notifications never changes (always false). No crash.

bugs.trigger: Leave 'Display name' empty and/or enter an email without '@', then click Continue.
bugs.expected: Submission is blocked; Continue is rejected until Display name is non-empty and Email contains '@'.
bugs.actual: Invalid input is accepted; the form proceeds and shows 'Continued ✓' as if valid.

bugs.trigger: Save a name on Settings (note: BUG-01 crashes the save, but state.savedName is still captured), then navigate to Profile and read the summary.
bugs.expected: The summary reads 'Name from Settings: <name>' reflecting the Settings name.
bugs.actual: The summary always renders blank ('Name from Settings: ') because it reads from profileMirror, which is never written.

bugs.trigger: Click the 'Reset all' button on the About screen.
bugs.expected: All state is cleared and the app routes back to Settings.
bugs.actual: Nothing is cleared and the app routes to '#/gone', an unknown route that renders an empty dead-end screen.

bugs.trigger: Use a naive locator (by text 'Save' or by [data-testid=save-button]) to find and click the Save action.
bugs.expected: The primary Save action has an accessible name / test id and is the element matched by 'Save'.
bugs.actual: The real button (💾, id=primary-action) has no accessible label/test id; a non-clickable decorative span carries the 'Save' text and data-testid=save-button, so naive locators hit the wrong element.
bugs.log_signature: missing a11y label on primary action
